# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Blob Storage to store application logs and backups. Configure for standard performance tier with default access settings. Skip lifecycle management policies for now to keep the template simple. This is for our logging infrastructure.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

resources: 
- name: storageaccountforlogs
  type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts     # Specify resource provider and type here, replace with your choice if necessary  
  apiVersion: '2018-07-01'                  # The API version to use for this template (replace as needed)   
  location: westus                          # Location of the resources - choose an available region. Replace or add additional regions when required    
  kind: Storage                             # Resource type   This should match your resource provider, replace with appropriate one if necessary     
  properties:                              # Properties for our storage account         
    accountName: myuniquestorageaccountname1234567890              # The name of the new Blob storage Account. Replace as required    
    location: westus                          # Location   This must match with previous step's value     
    kind: Storage                            # Kind should be set to "Storage" for this scenario
